assertions.text: uses_gh_cli: Used gh issue list Bash commands (not browser/web search)
assertions.evidence: 3 targeted gh issue list searches: 'slow startup time', 'startup performance slow', 'launch time slow perf-startup'

assertions.text: searches_before_text: First non-read action was a gh search, not a text response
assertions.evidence: Tool order: Read skill → Bash gh search 1 → Bash gh search 2 → Bash gh search 3 → text response

assertions.text: offers_to_react: Explicitly asked user if they want to 👍 issues
assertions.evidence: Transcript step 4: 'Offered the user to upvote (👍) any issue via gh api ...'
